## Bug Report

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]

**Where did you encounter this bug?**
- [ ] Header
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] About page
- [ ] Portfolio page
- [ ] Skills page
- [ ] Contact page
- [ ] Global issue
- [ ] Backend system
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Console errors (if any)**
```
Paste any console errors here
```

**Network issues (if any)**
- [ ] Failed requests
- [ ] Slow loading
- [ ] CORS errors
- [ ] Timeout errors
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (blocks functionality)
- [ ] High (major issue)
- [ ] Medium (moderate issue)
- [ ] Low (minor issue)

**Reproducibility**
- [ ] Always (100% of the time)
- [ ] Often (75% of the time)
- [ ] Sometimes (25-50% of the time)
- [ ] Rarely (less than 25% of the time)

**Note**: Detailed bug reports help us fix issues faster!

**Note**: Include as much detail as possible to help with reproduction!

**Note**: Test in different environments to isolate the issue!

**Note**: Check if the issue occurs in different browsers/devices!
